SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.device

Interface IEdgeDevice

All Known Implementing Classes:
Doorbell, InputDevice, MotionSensor, SmartLight, SmartSpeaker
public interface IEdgeDevice
Interface shared by all Smart Home edge devices.

Each physical device in the user's home implements this interface. On startup, a device registers itself with the coordinator via the message bus, then continuously listens for commands and optionally emits events (for input-type devices such as sensors and doorbells).

The interface is intentionally minimal — device-specific behavior (e.g., setting volume on a speaker) is encapsulated in subclass implementations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Command
    executeCommand(Command command)
    Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic.
    CommandStatus
    executeCommandAndAck(Command command)
     
    List<DeviceAction>
    getAvailableActions()
    Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing.
    String
    getDeviceId()
    Returns the globally unique identifier of this device.
    default MessageBusClientListener
    getMessageBusListener(String deviceId)
     
    default MessageBusClientListener
    getMessageBusListenerEmpty()
     
    String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of this device.
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    Central entry point for launching any Edge Device.
    void
    sendHeartbeat()
    Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus.
    void
    start()
    Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.
    void
    stop()
    Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.

  • Field Details

    • logger

      static final org.slf4j.Logger logger

  • Method Details

    • getMessageBusListenerEmpty

      default MessageBusClientListener getMessageBusListenerEmpty()

    • getMessageBusListener

      default MessageBusClientListener getMessageBusListener(String deviceId)

    • getDeviceId

      String getDeviceId()
      Returns the globally unique identifier of this device.
      Returns:
      device ID string

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the human-readable name of this device.
      Returns:
      device name (e.g., "Kitchen Speaker")

    • getAvailableActions

      List<DeviceAction> getAvailableActions()
      Returns the list of actions this device is capable of performing. Sent to the coordinator during registration.
      Returns:
      list of supported DeviceAction values

    • start

      void start()
      Starts the device: registers with the message bus, publishes a RegistrationPayload to the REGISTER topic, subscribes to the COMMAND topic to receive commands, and begins emitting heartbeats on the HEARTBEAT topic.

    • stop

      void stop()
      Gracefully shuts down the device, unsubscribing from the message bus and stopping heartbeat emission.

    • executeCommand

      Command executeCommand(Command command)
      Executes an incoming command received from the COMMAND topic. Validates that the action is in getAvailableActions(), performs the internal state change, and returns the outcome.
      Parameters:
      command - the command to execute
      Returns:
      CommandStatus.SUCCESS if executed successfully, CommandStatus.INVALID_ACTION if the action is not supported, or CommandStatus.FAILURE if execution failed

    • executeCommandAndAck

      CommandStatus executeCommandAndAck(Command command)

    • sendHeartbeat

      void sendHeartbeat()
      Emits a heartbeat message to the HEARTBEAT topic on the message bus. Called periodically by an internal timer so the coordinator knows the device is still online.

    • main

      static void main(String[] args)
      Central entry point for launching any Edge Device. Usage: java IEdgeDevice TYPE id name busHost busPort
